infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is required to accept in-person card payments.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Bluetooth is used to connect to Stripe card readers.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Bluetooth is used to connect to Stripe card readers.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Local network access is used to connect to Stripe card readers.
infoPlist.NFCReaderUsageDescription: NFC is used for Tap to Pay on iPhone.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Location access is required in order to accept payments.
plugins.bluetoothPeripheralPermission: Bluetooth access is required in order to connect to supported bluetooth card readers.
plugins.bluetoothAlwaysUsagePermission: This app uses Bluetooth to connect to supported card readers.
plugins.localNetworkUsagePermission: This app uses the local WiFi network to connect to supported card readers.
